descriptionText: Bali 4.4 For Sale 2022The Bali 4.4 For Sale 2022 is an appealing option for anyone looking for a well‑maintained cruising catamaran that blends comfort, practicality, and thoughtful design. This particular 2022 model is in good condition and offers a balanced combination of onboard autonomy, spacious living areas, and easy handling under sail. It suits sailors planning extended cruising as well as those seeking a comfortable platform for family holidays or liveaboard life.One of the well‑known characteristics of the Bali range is the rigid forward deck and the additional living space it provides, and the Bali 4.4 For Sale 2022 carries this feature with confidence. The solid bow area creates a forward cockpit that is pleasant under way and at anchor, and also allows for a large forward “garage” locker, which provides valuable storage. Combined with the flybridge, the boat offers multiple outdoor relaxation and social spaces.At the helm, visibility is wide and unobstructed, giving the skipper a reassuring sense of control. The flybridge layout is practical for both sailing and lounging, and the presence of electric winches helps simplify sail handling. With a reinforced squaretop mainsail and genoa, the boat is set up for enjoyable cruising performance, while the spinnaker kit with bowsprit adds versatility for downwind passages.For those planning long journeys, this Bali 4.4 For Sale 2022 stands out for its autonomy at sea. A soundproofed generator, a substantial watermaker, and a generous service battery bank allow for longer periods away from marinas. Freshwater storage and purification also contribute to making off‑grid living more convenient.Inside, the boat offers a comfortable and practical living environment. The galley is equipped with home‑style appliances, including a dishwasher and large oven, making meal preparation at sea more straightforward. The 3‑cabin layout provides comfortable sleeping spaces with elastic‑base mattresses. The saloon features a convertible table and a Club Corner with armchairs and a minibar, creating a relaxed atmosphere for socialising or quiet reading.The exterior layout remains one of the highlights. The flybridge offers a large sunpad and ergonomic seating, making it a pleasant place to spend time at anchor or during calm passages. Underwater LED lighting adds a nice touch during evenings, and the electric tender lift simplifies launching and retrieving the dinghy. Additional mooring cleats and practical deck equipment round off the deck layout.Whether viewed as a private cruising catamaran or a vessel suitable for charter, this Bali 4.4 For Sale 2022 presents a straightforward and comfortable package. Her condition, equipment level, and overall layout make her a solid choice for buyers looking for a ready‑to‑sail catamaran with practical features for extended use.Specifications:• Excellence + Elegance Pack • Reinforced Dacron squaretop mainsail • Genoa with UV protection • Lazy bag and lazy jacks • Spinnaker kit with bowsprit • Electric winches for headsails and solent • 11 kW soundproofed generator • 240 L/h watermaker (230 V) • Large service battery bank • Purified freshwater tank • Dishwasher (9 place settings) • Large oven • 4‑burner stove with pot holders • Washer‑dryer (6/1.5 kg) • Elastic‑base mattresses (3‑cabin version) • Club Corner with minibar and armchairs • Height‑adjustable convertible saloon table • Beige Grey interior and exterior upholstery • Hardtop at helm station • Flybridge cushions and sunpads with backrests • Four blue LED underwater lights • Gas plancha • Electric tender lift • Additional aft mooring cleats • Fusion Hi‑Fi with 6 Bluetooth speakers
descriptionHtml:
Bali 4.4 For Sale 2022

The Bali 4.4 For Sale 2022 is an appealing option for anyone looking for a well‑maintained cruising catamaran that blends comfort, practicality, and thoughtful design. This particular 2022 model is in good condition and offers a balanced combination of onboard autonomy, spacious living areas, and easy handling under sail. It suits sailors planning extended cruising as well as those seeking a comfortable platform for family holidays or liveaboard life.

One of the well‑known characteristics of the Bali range is the rigid forward deck and the additional living space it provides, and the Bali 4.4 For Sale 2022 carries this feature with confidence. The solid bow area creates a forward cockpit that is pleasant under way and at anchor, and also allows for a large forward “garage” locker, which provides valuable storage. Combined with the flybridge, the boat offers multiple outdoor relaxation and social spaces.

At the helm, visibility is wide and unobstructed, giving the skipper a reassuring sense of control. The flybridge layout is practical for both sailing and lounging, and the presence of electric winches helps simplify sail handling. With a reinforced squaretop mainsail and genoa, the boat is set up for enjoyable cruising performance, while the spinnaker kit with bowsprit adds versatility for downwind passages.

For those planning long journeys, this Bali 4.4 For Sale 2022 stands out for its autonomy at sea. A soundproofed generator, a substantial watermaker, and a generous service battery bank allow for longer periods away from marinas. Freshwater storage and purification also contribute to making off‑grid living more convenient.

Inside, the boat offers a comfortable and practical living environment. The galley is equipped with home‑style appliances, including a dishwasher and large oven, making meal preparation at sea more straightforward. The 3‑cabin layout provides comfortable sleeping spaces with elastic‑base mattresses. The saloon features a convertible table and a Club Corner with armchairs and a minibar, creating a relaxed atmosphere for socialising or quiet reading.

The exterior layout remains one of the highlights. The flybridge offers a large sunpad and ergonomic seating, making it a pleasant place to spend time at anchor or during calm passages. Underwater LED lighting adds a nice touch during evenings, and the electric tender lift simplifies launching and retrieving the dinghy. Additional mooring cleats and practical deck equipment round off the deck layout.

Whether viewed as a private cruising catamaran or a vessel suitable for charter, this Bali 4.4 For Sale 2022 presents a straightforward and comfortable package. Her condition, equipment level, and overall layout make her a solid choice for buyers looking for a ready‑to‑sail catamaran with practical features for extended use.

Specifications:

• Excellence + Elegance Pack
• Reinforced Dacron squaretop mainsail
• Genoa with UV protection
• Lazy bag and lazy jacks
• Spinnaker kit with bowsprit
• Electric winches for headsails and solent
• 11 kW soundproofed generator
• 240 L/h watermaker (230 V)
• Large service battery bank
• Purified freshwater tank
• Dishwasher (9 place settings)
• Large oven
• 4‑burner stove with pot holders
• Washer‑dryer (6/1.5 kg)
• Elastic‑base mattresses (3‑cabin version)
• Club Corner with minibar and armchairs
• Height‑adjustable convertible saloon table
• Beige Grey interior and exterior upholstery
• Hardtop at helm station
• Flybridge cushions and sunpads with backrests
• Four blue LED underwater lights
• Gas plancha
• Electric tender lift
• Additional aft mooring cleats
• Fusion Hi‑Fi with 6 Bluetooth speakers
